title: collinsia austromontana
intro: Collinsia austromontana, also known as the blue throatwort or mountain blue-throated gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which are said to include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Collinsia austromontana are believed to include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of Collinsia austromontana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
